name: fleet-host-e2e
description: Layer D — real UI end-to-end tests for the Fleet Tauri host (tauri-driver + WebdriverIO). Drives the built fleet-host binary in its FLEET_E2E_RAIL_ONLY composition and asserts the rename flow + the survives-reregister regression against the live rail DOM. CI/Linux only — never run locally (heavy node/GUI + macOS TCC prompts).
